---
slug: footnote-callout
---

# Footnote callout

A regular paragraph also has its own footnote[^outer].

[^outer]: Outer paragraph's footnote.

> [!warning]
> A callout containing a footnote[^in] used to render the same
> `<li id="fn…">` twice — once inside the callout block and once
> in the document's trailing footnote list — producing duplicate
> ids on a single page.

[^in]: Footnote inside the callout body.
